paragraphs: I'm writing to apply for the Technical Lead (.NET / ASP.NET MVC) role with Avensys Consulting Inc. I'm a Senior Software Engineer with over 5 years of professional experience across the .NET stack, most recently leading day-to-day technical governance on a two-system insurance platform that spans a legacy .NET Framework application and a modern .NET Core microservices backend with a React frontend — the same C#, ASP.NET, and React combination this role is built around.

At Delta Insurance, I review the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers to keep the codebase aligned with SOLID principles, and I own release scheduling and execution across both systems. Earlier, at Moreton Bay Technology and Punongbayan & Araullo, I used Azure DevOps for source control, code reviews, and CI/CD pipelines while maintaining SQL Server and Oracle databases — the same enterprise Microsoft-stack discipline (architecture, RESTful APIs, Agile delivery) this role calls for.

My day-to-day leadership so far has centered on architectural governance and code review rather than a formal people-management title, but that governance work — holding a team to a shared architectural standard — is the core of what a technical lead does, and I'm ready to take on that title formally, including mentoring and coaching engineers directly.
I'd welcome the chance to discuss how I can contribute to your team and am available to start on short notice. Thank you for your consideration.
